channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 45,000 — Lovely home, ready for completion (Glen Norah, Harare High Density)
item.description: USD 45,000 — Glen Norah, Harare High Density. 4 beds, 2 baths. Lovely home, ready for completion. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
